name: Mirrorjade the Iceblade Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミラジェイド
desc:
"Fallen of Albaz" + 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
You can only control 1 "Mirrorjade the Iceblade Dragon". Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to the GY that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material; banish 1 monster on the field, also this card cannot use this effect next turn. If this Fusion Summoned card in its owner's control leaves the field by an opponent's card: You can destroy all monsters your opponent controls during the End Phase of this turn.
